hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: I build high-performance web applications with modern tech stacks. Specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript with a focus on architecture and user experience.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who I Am
about.description: Front-end Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and building high-performance web applications. Experienced in developing scalable and maintainable codebases using TypeScript, React, and NextJS. Skilled in designing and executing unit and end-to-end tests to ensure application reliability. Leveraged AI-assisted tools to streamline development workflows and enhance code quality. Applied robust architectures and software design principles to deliver reliable, efficient, and user-focused solutions in real-world projects.
about.description2: Currently working as a Full-Stack Engineer at Partnerz (Dubai), I've contributed to products serving 200+ universities globally and a mental health study with 20,000+ participants.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind, want to collaborate, or just say hello? My inbox is always open.
